```css
100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100| ```)
```100|1000|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|1000|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|100|10|100|10|100|10|10|10|100|100|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|0|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|0|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|10|50|10|50|5|5|5|5|5
``` ...
